The Tree of Flavors

Where Every Branch
Tells a Story

01 — Signature

Egusi
Soup

Ground melon seeds slow-cooked with tender assorted meats, ponmo and aromatic forest vegetables in a rich palm-oil base. A bowl of heritage in every serving.

Available in 1.5L · 2.5L · Party pots
02 — Signature

Efo Riro
& Assorted

Vibrant Lagos-style spinach soup loaded with assorted meats, snails and ponmo, finished with toasted crayfish and indigenous peppers — bold, deep, unforgettable.

Wedding & Event Favourite
03 — Signature

Banga
Soup

A Delta classic — rich palm-nut broth simmered with dried fish, assorted meats and indigenous spices including oburunbebe stick and atama leaves. Deep, aromatic and utterly satisfying.

Delta Heritage Special
04 — Bestseller

Smoky Party
Jollof Rice

The legendary party jollof — cooked over firewood for that iconic smoky bottom, seasoned to perfection and served alongside juicy fried beef and ripe plantain.

The Party Staple
05 — Specialty

Nigerian
Fried Rice

Beautifully seasoned long-grain rice stir-fried with garden vegetables, liver and juicy fried chicken — vibrant in colour, irresistible in flavour. A celebration must-have.

Event & Party Favourite
06 — Specialty

Jollof Rice
with Fish

Our celebrated party jollof paired with beautifully marinated fried fish and a fiery stew — a combination that never fails to draw second helpings at every gathering.

Available for Bulk Orders
07 — Event Special

Full Buffet
Experience

The complete Alayo's Kitchen spread — soups, rice, proteins and delicacies laid out in premium presentation for weddings, corporate dinners and milestone celebrations.

Full Event Catering Available
